positions.thesis: EXPANDED POSITION: US-Iran war, Khamenei dead. Gold surging $5,300+ (+2% intraday). Flight-to-safety accelerating. JPMorgan $6,300 target (+23%). Only safe-haven play in crisis.
positions.news_trigger: Sentinel brief #1 - US-Iran conflict, gold surge to $5,300
positions.note: CRISIS TRADE: Sold all equity exposure (QQQ/DAX/CAC) to lock gains before selloff. Deployed proceeds into gold. Portfolio now 66% cash + 34% gold (pure defensive stance).

trades_history.reason: STOP-LOSS TRIGGERED: BTC crashed from $96,500 to $68,434 (-29.2% in USD). Far exceeded -5% stop-loss threshold. Thesis invalidated - $100k breakout failed, market reversed sharply.
Portfolio diversification after BTC loss. JPMorgan targets $6,300 (+23% upside). Geopolitical and inflation hedge.
European rotation accelerating. CAC 40 ATH 8,625, outperforming US. Rotation from US tech into European quality/utilities/financials. S&P Global raises GDP forecast.
RISK-OFF: US-Iran war, Khamenei dead. Nasdaq futures -1.2%, S&P -1%. Lock in +21.9% gains before selloff. Tech gets hit hardest in geopolitical crisis.
RISK-OFF: European indices under pressure (DAX -0.02%, STOXX -0.38%). Small gain preserved. Avoid selloff.
RISK-OFF: Exit break-even position before European selloff. Preserve capital.
SAFE-HAVEN PLAY: Gold surging $5,300+ (+2% intraday). Flight-to-safety accelerating. Deploy equity sale proceeds into only winning asset class today.
